channel.title: bspwm on boucek.me
channel.description: Recent content in bspwm on boucek.me

item.title: bspwm - minimalistic and efficient desktop
item.description: I would like to describe the concept of my ideal desktop. The main values are simplicity - which means only necessary services and dependencies installed; efficiency - desktop actions that can be executed by keyboard shortcuts; and customisable - so I can add or remove whatever functionality I want. The concept is very different from what I have been using my whole life. So what changed my mind? The idea came from a series called Ricing your *nix desktop, published on FreeBSD Telegram channel.
